mapper.sql: id, route_id, section_id, route_code, unit_code, direction, lane_no, start_stake, end_stake, length_m, pavement_type, technical_grade, road_width, adcode, manage_org_id, ST_AsGeoJSON(geom) AS geom_geo_json, ST_AsGeoJSON(center_point) AS center_point_geo_json, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM road_evaluation_unit WHERE ORDER BY route_code ASC, start_stake ASC, lane_no ASC
SELECT FROM road_evaluation_unit WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND id=#{id} AND deleted=false
SELECT FROM road_evaluation_unit WHERE AND geom IS NOT NULL ORDER BY route_code ASC, start_stake ASC, lane_no ASC

SELECT id AS unit_id, unit_code, route_code, direction, start_stake, end_stake, ST_AsGeoJSON(center_point) AS center_point_geo_json, ST_AsGeoJSON(geom) AS geom_geo_json FROM road_evaluation_unit WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND route_code=#{q.routeCode} AND (direction=#{q.direction} OR direction='BOTH') AND start_stake <= #{q.stake} AND end_stake >= #{q.stake} AND deleted=false ORDER BY CASE WHEN direction=#{q.direction} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, start_stake ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO road_evaluation_unit(id, tenant_id, route_id, section_id, route_code, unit_code, direction, lane_no, start_stake, end_stake, length_m, pavement_type, technical_grade, road_width, adcode, manage_org_id, geom, center_point, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{routeId}, #{sectionId}, #{routeCode}, #{unitCode}, #{direction}, #{laneNo}, #{startStake}, #{endStake}, #{lengthM}, #{pavementType}, #{technicalGrade}, #{roadWidth}, #{adcode}, #{manageOrgId}, ST_GeomFromText(#{geomWkt}, 4326)NULL, ST_GeomFromText(#{centerPointWkt}, 4326)ST_PointOnSurface(ST_GeomFromText(#{geomWkt}, 4326))NULL, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, now(), now(), false)
mapper.update: UPDATE road_evaluation_unit SET route_id=#{routeId}, section_id=#{sectionId}, route_code=#{routeCode}, unit_code=#{unitCode}, direction=#{direction}, lane_no=#{laneNo}, start_stake=#{startStake}, end_stake=#{endStake}, length_m=#{lengthM}, pavement_type=#{pavementType}, technical_grade=#{technicalGrade}, road_width=#{roadWidth}, adcode=#{adcode}, manage_org_id=#{manageOrgId}, updated_by=#{updatedBy}, updated_at=now() , geom=ST_GeomFromText(#{geomWkt}, 4326) , center_point=ST_GeomFromText(#{centerPointWkt}, 4326) WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND id=#{id} AND deleted=false
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM road_evaluation_unit WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND unit_code=#{unitCode} AND deleted=false LIMIT 1
